name: Security / Vulnerability Report

labels: security, needs-triage

---

> 🔒 **Do not share sensitive security details publicly.** If your report contains sensitive information, please use GitHub’s private vulnerability reporting (Security tab → Report a vulnerability) instead of filing an issue.

## Summary

Provide a high-level description of the security concern.

## Vulnerability Details

Describe the vulnerability, including affected components and any prerequisites.

## Reproduction Steps

1.
2.
3.

## Impact Assessment

Explain the potential impact if exploited.

## Suggested Mitigations

Share any remediation ideas or temporary workarounds.

## Proof of Concept

Provide scripts, payloads, or screenshots demonstrating the issue (sanitize sensitive data).

## Additional Context

Add links, related issues, or other supporting information.
